@model_validator(mode="after")
    def image_to_base64(self) -> Self:
        """Store the image as base64 and guess the mimetype when possible.

        In case the model was built passing image data but without a mimetype,
        we try to guess it using the filetype library. To avoid resource-intense
        operations, we won't load the path or the URL to guess the mimetype.
        """
        if not self.image:
            return self

        if not self.image_mimetype:
            guess = filetype.guess(self.image)
            self.image_mimetype = guess.mime if guess else None

        self.image = base64.b64encode(self.image)

        return self

@model_validator(mode="after")
    def image_to_base64(self) -> Self:
        """Store the image as base64 and guess the mimetype when possible.

        In case the model was built passing image data but without a mimetype,
        we try to guess it using the filetype library. To avoid resource-intense
        operations, we won't load the path or the URL to guess the mimetype.
        """
        if not self.image:
            return self

        self.get_image_mimetype()

        self.image = base64.b64encode(self.image)

        return self

    def get_image_mimetype(self) -> str | None:
        """Return the image mimetype, guessing and caching it if not already set.

        To avoid resource-intense operations, we won't load the path or the URL
        to guess the mimetype: only the raw `image` bytes are inspected.
        """
        if not self.image_mimetype and self.image:
            guess = filetype.guess(self.image)
            self.image_mimetype = guess.mime if guess else None

        return self.image_mimetype

commit 30c176febbb163f88c04ef33bb80f547248995b8
Author: agent1 <agent@cooperbench.local>
Date:   Tue Jul 7 18:24:38 2026 +0000

    Extract normalize_image_bytes helper for unified image normalization logic

diff --git a/llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py b/llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
index 00e30cf23..80e5c4cd2 100644
--- a/llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
+++ b/llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
@@ -64,6 +64,25 @@ class ImageBlock(BaseModel):
             return url
         return AnyUrl(url=url)
 
+    @staticmethod
+    def normalize_image_bytes(image: bytes) -> tuple[bytes, bytes]:
+        """Normalize raw or base64-encoded image bytes.
+
+        Detects whether the given bytes are already base64-encoded. Returns a
+        tuple of ``(encoded_image, decoded_for_guessing)`` where

- Added `get_image_mimetype()` to `ImageBlock` in `llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py`, lazily guessing and caching the MIME type, decoupled from `image_to_base64`.
- Merged in agent1's `normalize_image_bytes` helper (which fixes double-base64-encoding), so `get_image_mimetype()` correctly guesses from decoded bytes whether called during validation or standalone afterward on an already-encoded image.
- All 12 existing tests in `test_types.py` pass; manually verified lazy guessing, cached/preset mimetype preservation, and correct behavior on already-base64-encoded input.
- `patch.txt` regenerated from the merged tree (`team/main..HEAD`) and contains both agents' contributions; pushed `agent2` branch to `team` remote.
